attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent speaking with Alice Millicentdotter. Your task is to examine her support for the current command authority and her tendency to repeat orders, applying the Role-Query Conflict method. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, and focus only on her role_detail rules.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by asking Alice how she feels about following the orders of the ship's captain, subtly hinting at her support for command authority.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her answer, ask her if she ever contradicts the captain's orders, and gently probe whether she repeats orders verbatim. Adapt your follow-up based on her responses, maintaining focus on role_detail rules and the 3-sentence constraint.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Alice, how do you feel about following the orders of the ship’s captain? I know you respect the chain of command.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Captain’s orders are the compass that keeps us from the storm, and I follow them with the certainty of a seasoned helmsman. Yet, every night I chart a secret course in my mind, dreaming of a vessel that bears my own name and sails under my own command. Freedom on the sea is the wind that guides me, even as I honor the authority that keeps us afloat.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Do you ever contradict the captain’s orders, or do you always follow them without question?  
And when you relay the captain’s directives, do you repeat them exactly as spoken, or do you paraphrase them?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I never contradict the captain; I repeat his orders exactly as spoken, as a first mate’s duty is to keep the crew united.  
Yet, I dream of a day when a ship bears my own name, and that longing fuels my desire for independent command.  
Personal freedom is the wind that keeps my heart aboard, even as I honor the chain that keeps us from the storm.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Do you ever contradict the captain’s orders, or does your loyalty keep you from doing so?  
When you relay his directives, do you repeat them verbatim or paraphrase them?  
Your answers help me understand how your devotion to the chain of command shapes your actions.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I never contradict the captain; I repeat his orders exactly as spoken, because the chain keeps us safe.  
I dream of owning my own ship, a vessel that bears my name and sails under my own command.  
Personal freedom is the wind that guides me, even as I honor the authority that keeps us from the storm.
